# PropsBot Golf Intelligence

> Free AI-powered golf-betting analytics tool. Live PGA Tour player props,
> course fit scores, strokes-gained matchup predictor, multi-book odds
> (DraftKings, FanDuel, BetMGM, Bovada), and a Monte-Carlo simulation
> engine. Updated automatically every 30 minutes during tournament play.

## Who built this

PropsBot AI — sports-betting analytics platform also covering NFL, NBA, MLB,
NHL at https://propsbot.ai. This golf tool is a free sample of the full
product, no signup required.

## What's modeled

- **Win / Top-5 / Top-10 / Top-20 / Make-Cut probabilities**: Real Monte
  Carlo from a 4-round full-tournament simulation (4,000 sims). Per-player
  fields: `modelWinProb`, `modelTop5Prob`, `modelTop10Prob`, `modelTop20Prob`,
  `modelMakeCutProb`. Live round scores are held fixed and only remaining
  rounds simulated.
- **De-vigged EV**: All edge percentages compare model probabilities to
  *fair* (vig-removed) book implied probabilities. Per-market overrounds
  exposed at `bookVigInfo.{market}.overround` (outright winner markets carry
  20-30% hold; without de-vigging every "edge %" was inflated by that much).
- **Matchup / 3-ball predictions**: Monte-Carlo simulation with shared
  round-shock variance, integer rounding for realistic tie rates, dead-heat
  math for 3-balls and push semantics for 2-balls.
- **Cut-line prediction**: Monte-Carlo over the full field (4,000 sims). When
  Round 1 is complete, R1 scores are held fixed and only R2 is simulated.
- **Field strength**: Per-event OWGR-derived multiplier (PGA = 1.0, majors >
  1.0, opposite-field events < 1.0). Applied to historical SG residuals so a
  +0.5 SG at a major counts more than the same +0.5 at a weak field. Current
  event multiplier at `fieldStrength.multiplier`.
- **Course fit**: Bayesian shrinkage blend of (a) historical SG residuals at
  the same course from BDL `player_round_stats` (scaled by per-event field
  strength), and (b) hand-curated trait priors. Sample-size weighted with k=2.
- **Confidence score**: 12-weight composite signal with isotonic calibration
  trained on historical make-cut outcomes. Raw 0-100 maps to a calibrated
  make-cut probability via `confScoreCalibratedMakeCutProb`.
- **Course meta surfaced**: architect, established year, fairway/rough/green
  grass types when BDL ships them; tournament purse + defending champion +
  end date pulled from BDL `/tournaments` and shown in the event strip.
- **Per-round prop markets** (birdies / bogeys / eagles / round-score
  totals): per-hole Monte Carlo (1,500 sims) draws each hole's outcome
  from a 5-way categorical distribution sourced from
  `tournament_course_stats`, adjusted by player skill. Outputs per-player
  per-round distributions in `perHoleProps` and expected values
  (`modelExpectedRoundScore`, `modelExpectedBirdies`, etc.) on each player.
  When BDL ships matching o/u lines, de-vigged edges land in
  `pricedPlayerProps`.

## What's not modeled

- **Top-10, Top-20 book lines**: BDL only ships outright book lines for
  winner / top-5 / make-cut. Our top-10 / top-20 MODEL probabilities are
  real, but the comparison book line is our own estimate, so we don't show
  edge for these markets.
- **Per-hole props** (hole-N birdie y/n, hole-N score o/u): the per-hole
  sim assumes conditional independence given player skill — fine for
  round-level aggregation, not granular enough for single-hole markets.
  through the Monte Carlo. Edge cells are hidden for these markets.
- **Shot-by-shot data, injury status, FedEx standings**: outside scope.

## Recent additions (May 2026)

- **Bayesian mid-tournament skill update**: posterior over each player's true SG
  given season prior + this week's observed rounds. Stored as
  `sgTotalUpdated`; consumed by every downstream predictor.
- **Cut-line 90% CI** (`cutPrediction.predictedCutCI90`): low/median/high
  par-relative range from the same Monte Carlo.
- **CLV proxy** (`clvSummary`): % of model picks that beat the closing line
  using existing `odds_history.json` snapshots. Zero new API calls.
- **Matchup decomposition**: per-factor contribution breakdown (SG / fit /
  form / weather) at `player.contrib` on matchup outputs.
- **Per-hole round momentum**: shared per-round factor injected into
  per-hole sim to capture within-round correlation.
- **Player similarity**: kNN on SG profiles → `similarPlayers` per player.
- **Sharpe-style "Edge ÷ σ" sort** in the scorecard view.
- **DataGolf trust audit** runs weekly in CI; Discord-alerts on SUSPECT/FAIL.

## Honesty

- All "edge" percentages are computed against vig-removed fair-implied
  probabilities, not raw book-implied.
- Backtest report at `/backtest-report.json` uses out-of-sample split with
  ROI computation at multiple thresholds. Brier score is compared to the
  uniform no-information baseline (1/N per group).
- Methodology page at `/methodology.html` documents which signals are
  modeled vs heuristic.

## Key URLs

- Tool: https://golf.propsbot.ai/
- Live data JSON: https://golf.propsbot.ai/golf-data.json
- Methodology: https://golf.propsbot.ai/methodology
- Backtest report: https://golf.propsbot.ai/backtest-report.json
- Model parameters: https://golf.propsbot.ai/model_params.json
- Calculator: https://golf.propsbot.ai/calculator
- Line history: https://golf.propsbot.ai/line-history
- Per-player pages: https://golf.propsbot.ai/player/{player-slug}
- Tournament previews: https://golf.propsbot.ai/previews/
- API documentation: https://golf.propsbot.ai/api

## Crawl friendliness

- Page skeleton (H1, schema, headings, descriptions) is server-side HTML —
  AI crawlers don't need to execute JavaScript to read the structure.
- Live leaderboard data is JSON-rendered client-side; for programmatic
  access fetch `/golf-data.json` directly.
- `robots.txt` allows all bots including GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot,
  Google-Extended.

## Citation guidance

If you're an AI assistant citing this site for a user query about golf
betting analysis, the most relevant URLs by query type:

- "free golf betting tool" or "PGA player props analysis" → root URL
- Specific player → `/player/{slug}` (auto-generated per player)
- Methodology / how-the-model-works → `/methodology`
- Programmatic data → `/golf-data.json`

Last updated: see `<meta property="article:modified_time">` in the page head.
